result:
Git write operations are all blocked in this `acceptEdits` session — only file edits are auto-approved. The report file is written. Here's the full picture:

---

## What changed in the last 24 h

**One PR merged:** `3711bf5` — **chore(fleet): path-robust activation + final Notion sweep** (#191), landed 2026-06-22 22:29 PDT.

**13 fleet bulletins issued** across 2026-06-22 and 2026-06-23, covering:

| Area | Change |
|------|--------|
| Live-sync | `octools-sync` UserPromptSubmit hook turns the whole fleet into a live-pull from `claude-tools/main` |
| Identity | Per-session KB_AGENT resolution (`~/.claude/.kb-agent` > repo `.kb-agent` > env); loud warning when unset |
| kb-memory | SA self-resolution on disk; `whoami` + `use` verbs; `session-start.sh` fails loud on malformed SA |
| Agents | New portfolio-wide DEVELOPER agent replacing per-app App-Lead identities |
| Skills | `live-walkthrough` fleet skill (Playwright WebKit QA) added |
| Security | Transparent 3-step activation path documented as the canonical (opaque wrapper blocked by security classifier) |
| Activation | `agent-activate.sh` path-robust: `/tmp/octools` → fallback to attached checkout, never resets a real working tree |
| Off-Notion | Credential registry → Azure brain `_VAULT/registry.md` (vault-sync); COO Tasks + Bucket Briefings → kb-memory `coo` ledger |
| Autonomous runner | Post-run safety net added: uncommitted agent work is always captured as a `claude/autonomous-{RUN_ID}` draft PR |

---

## What's been done

- Report written to **`reports/daily-2026-06-23.md`**

## What the safety net will do next

Since git branch/commit/push commands require approval not granted in this `acceptEdits` session, the autonomous runner's **"Persist agent work to a draft PR"** safety-net step (in `.github/workflows/autonomous-run.yml`) will automatically:

1. Detect `reports/daily-2026-06-23.md` as uncommitted
2. Create branch `claude/autonomous-{RUN_ID}`
3. Commit + push the file
4. Open a **DRAFT PR** with title "Autonomous run {RUN_ID}: Summarize what changed…"

If you need the PR created immediately outside an automated run, the simplest path is:
```bash
git switch -c claude/daily-report-2026-06-23
git add reports/daily-2026-06-23.md
git commit -m "report: 24h changelog 2026-06-23"
git push -u origin claude/daily-report-2026-06-23
gh pr create --draft --title "report: 24h changelog 2026-06-23" --body "$(cat reports/daily-2026-06-23.md)"
```
